message:
refactor: disable performance monitoring tools by default
- switch default visibility of performance monitor pill and profiler overlay to false in timeline viewer configuration
automated: update project statistics

refactor: unify panel styles and update timeline defaults
- remove redundant changeScalePanel config in favor of shared panel styles
- increase default timelineGroupedLineGap from 48 to 100 for better separation
- set default extendedTicksContrast to 30% for improved visibility
- revert temporary debug colors for panel borders and separators to production values

refactor: render extended ticks on separate background layers
- introduce separate Graphics instances for extended scale ticks (timelineScaleExtendedGraphics, timelineChangeScaleExtendedGraphics)
- set z-index of extended layers to 1 to ensure they render behind all other timeline elements
- update drawScale and drawChangeScale to use new graphics objects for extended tick rendering
- prevents extended lines from drawing over graph content and UI elements

feat: add contrast control for extended scale ticks
- implement 'extendedTicksContrast' configuration option (0-100%)
- dynamic adjustment of tick alpha and width based on contrast setting
- apply contrast boosting to both time scale and change scale extended ticks
- expose new control in tweakpane interface

refactor: optimize change scale tick rendering loop
- split change scale tick rendering into separate passes for extended lines and axis ticks
- reduce stroke calls by batching line drawing operations
- prevent redundant state checks inside the tick loop

refactor: fine-tune scale geometry and panel styles
- increase timeline scale height to 60px for better legibility
- implement configurable panel overlays with extra width/height margins
- add specific changeScalePanel config for distinct border and separator colors
- adjust tick padding and label inset for change scale layout
- update drawing logic to respect new geometry offsets and separators

refactor: use scale style config for top timeline labels
- update drawScale to use centralized style constants for major, minor, and milestone labels
- add label configuration properties to topScale section in scale-config.ts
- remove hardcoded text styles from timeline index.ts

refactor: extract scale configuration to dedicated config file
- move scale styling constants to src/apps/timeline/scale-config.ts
- update TimelineViewer to use centralized scale style configuration
- decouple hardcoded style values from rendering logic for easier theme adjustments
- improve consistency of tick styles and panel properties across scale renderings

add background panel and extended ticks to change scale
- render opaque background panel for change scale area to improve readability
- add option to extend change scale ticks across the entire timeline
- adjust change scale padding and inset values for tighter layout
- implement visibility toggling for extended change scale ticks configuration
human: update prompt collection; add AI generated glossary and cleanup docs

refactor: rename timeline pan modes and change default centering
- rename Left Pan Mode options to more user-friendly labels (Horizontal, Both (Simple), Both (Lock-On), Both (Dead-Zone))
- change default Locked Commit Centering from 'Both' to 'Vertical' to reduce disorientation on click

add configurable commit centering behavior to timeline
- implement LockedCommitCentering modes: None, Horizontal, Vertical, Both
- update centerOnScreenPoint to respect the selected centering mode
- expose centering configuration option in tweakpane settings
- fix z-index stacking context for inline help root container

feat: enhance inline help window with opacity and resizing controls
- add opacity slider to window header with persistence support
- implement manual window resizing using 8-directional drag handles
- prevent resizing when window is snapped, minimized, or maximized
- ensure window opacity state is restored from local storage
- add css styles for resize handles and range input control

human: add screenshot assets for timeline performance documentation
- add performance-monitor.png showing the pill header widget
- add profiler-overlay.png showing the detailed profiler breakdown
- images are used in inline help documentation

add draggable inline help window manager to timeline app
- implement InlineHelpWindowManager and InlineHelpWindow classes for managing floating help windows
- add window management features: dragging, snapping (edges/corners), minimizing, maximizing, and state persistence via localStorage
- integrate inline help system with timeline app for profiler overlay documentation
- extend markdown renderer to support images and customizable link resolution/handling
- add keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+1-4 snap, Ctrl+M minimize, Ctrl+Q close) for window control

add jsdom dependency and update markdown renderer tests
- add jsdom to devDependencies for vitest environment support
- update markdown renderer tests to be more resilient to host origin changes
- improve link resolution assertions by using URL search parameters instead of hardcoded strings

buggy (tests fail): refactor: extract markdown rendering logic to shared core utility
- move renderMarkdown and resolveMarkdownHref to src/core/markdown/renderer.ts
- update src/apps/markdown-viewer/index.ts to use the extracted utility
- add comprehensive unit tests for markdown rendering and link resolution
- ensure consistent rendering behavior across different application contexts

add technical documentation for timeline profiler overlay
- describe measured metrics for frame timing and render breakdown sections
- explain calculation methods for average and 95th percentile stats
- define scope and limitations of the profiling implementation
- provide details on sampling frequency and display update intervals

refactor: modernize profiler overlay layout and positioning
- center profiler overlay at the top of the viewport
- restructure profiler content into distinct Frame and Render Breakdown sections
- implement grid layout for render breakdown metrics
- enable profiler overlay by default in configuration
- add css for section titles and multi-column grid display

add granular profiling sections to timeline performance overlay
- instrument drawTimeline method to measure execution time of distinct rendering phases
- add support for tracking and displaying multiple section samples (layout, lines, change, commits, scale, etc.)
- update profiler overlay text to include per-section last and average duration stats
- hide zero-duration sections from profiler output to reduce noise

add detailed pixijs profiler overlay to timeline
- add configuration option and tweakpane control to toggle profiler overlay
- implement sampling and calculation of render time and frame time stats (last, avg, p95)
- instrument drawTimeline to measure actual rendering duration
- add floating overlay element with tabular numeric display to timeline html

allow toggling performance monitor in timeline view
- add configuration option to show/hide performance monitor
- implement dynamic placement of performance pill (header vs floating)
- add css for floating performance pill position
- optimize performance ticker to skip updates when hidden

add performance monitoring display to timeline viewer
- add performance pill showing FPS and frame delta time in header
- update metrics via PixiJS ticker at 250ms intervals
- clean up ticker handler on timeline destruction
- style pill with dark theme and pill-shaped border
automated: update project statistics

refactor: remove unused state and dead code in timeline app
- remove timelineDraggingGroups and timelineDragLast instance variables
- remove unused findCommitPointAt method
- remove redundant variable assignments and branching in pointer move logic
- simplify pointer event handlers by eliminating obsolete state tracking
automated: update project statistics

human: update todo lists and documentation from recent sessions
- add initial prompt and feature specs to TODOS-asimov-core.md
- create TODOS-chats.md with notes on vibe coding and project history
- update clean-code.md with review checklists for timeline and general codebase
- update commit-messages.md with latest formatting rules and labels
- update grid.md with particle style and radius tasks
- update timeline.md with detailed session history and feature requirements

refactor: simplify timeline panning modes and input handling
- remove 'Two-stage threshold' pan mode and associated logic
- change default Left Pan mode to 'Direction-lock on drag start'
- remove right-drag group scrolling support to streamline interaction
- update dynamic gesture hints to reflect simplified controls
- ensure smart pan axis is reset correctly on pointer up

refactor: implement advanced combined panning logic in timeline
- introduce direction-lock, dead-zone, and two-stage threshold smart pan modes
- add axis snapping logic to prevent unintended diagonal drifting when combined panning is enabled
- refactor pointer event handlers to use shared applyGroupDrag and updateSmartPanAxis helpers
- update UI config with granular left-pan mode options and dynamic gesture hints

implement configurable left-pan modes in timeline
- introduce LeftPanMode with 'Time Axis Only', 'Naive Combined', and 'Smart Combined' options
- enable 'Naive Combined' mode to allow simultaneously panning time and scrolling groups with left-drag
- add UI control for left-pan mode and update dynamic gesture hints
- refactor pointer event handlers to support combined panning logic

implement right-drag for group scrolling in timeline
- capture right-click button to initiate group dragging when grouping is active
- update pointer up logic to prevent right-click from clearing locked commits
- update gesture hints UI to include right-drag interaction

bugfix: refine hover highlight and change scale behavior
- hide hover highlight if it matches the locked commit
- align change scale visibility with the locked commit instead of hover
- hide change scale in grouped mode when no lock is active

bugfix: refine timeline interaction and navigation logic
- clicking empty space now clears the locked commit
- keyboard navigation now correctly updates the locked commit state
- z-index adjustment: render hover highlights below the locked commit marker
- improve click detection by using hovered commit state during pointer down
- ensure navigation shortcuts are consistently tied to the locked commit

implement commit locking in timeline view
- click a commit to lock its details in the info panel
- use right-click or Escape to clear the locked commit
- add visual markers and UI hints for lock/unlock state
- update sidebar gesture list with new interaction patterns
- ensure locked commit details persist during timeline navigation

bugfix: refine timeline navigation logic and prevent redundant updates
- add equality checks to prevent navigation to the currently active commit
- introduce getGroupEarliestCommit and getGroupLatestCommit helpers
- fix navigateGroupEdge to use new group boundary helpers
- ensure navigation is idempotent when at group or timeline boundaries

bugfix: improve vertical navigation accuracy in grouped timeline
- use relative time position within group instead of absolute timestamp for ArrowUp/ArrowDown navigation
- implement getCommitGroupPosition helper to calculate time offset from group start

bugfix: prevent hotkeys from triggering while interacting with Tweakpane controls
- update isTextInputActive to return true if the focused element is within the Tweakpane container

implement smooth animated transitions for timeline centering
- add animateToOffsets helper using requestAnimationFrame and quadratic easing
- introduce transitionDuration setting to control animation speed via UI
- ensure ongoing animations are cancelled when user initiates manual drag or zoom
- update centerOnScreenPoint to trigger animations when navigating between commits

implement vertical navigation in grouped timeline
- add ArrowUp/ArrowDown to jump between groups while maintaining relative time position
- find closest commit by timestamp in the target group when navigating vertically
- update gesture hints in timeline.html to include vertical navigation shortcuts

implement timeline keyboard navigation and hotkeys
- add ArrowLeft/ArrowRight to navigate between commits and center view
- add Home/End to jump to the start/end of the current group
- add 'f' key to toggle fullscreen mode
- implement centerOnCommitData and centerOnScreenPoint for precise view centering
- add isTextInputActive check to prevent hotkey triggers while typing
- ensure consistent navigation behavior in both grouped and flat timeline modes

refactor: ensure fullscreen mode consistency in timeline app
- Automatically exit fullscreen when switching display modes.
- Hide fullscreen toggle button when not in Timeline mode.
- Clean up commented code in git timeline recreation script.
- Remove redundant !important markers from fullscreen button styles.

refactor: unify fullscreen button styles and improve UI
- Create a shared `.fullscreen-button` class to unify styles for enter/exit fullscreen buttons.
- Hide the main `<h2>` title in fullscreen mode for a cleaner view.
- Add CSS resets to ensure consistent button appearance across browsers.

refactor: consolidate fullscreen logic and add exit mechanisms
- Extract toggleFullscreenMode to unify fullscreen state transitions.
- Add an overlay "Exit Fullscreen" button within the timeline container.
- Implement Escape key listener to exit fullscreen mode.
- Add CSS styles for the new exit button and handle its visibility.

implement fullscreen mode and dynamic gesture hints in timeline
- Add fullscreen toggle button and state management to hide UI elements.
- Show/hide group-specific gesture hints based on current grouping state.
- Default extended scale ticks to enabled for improved cross-group alignment.
- Update sidebar and header layout to accommodate new interactive controls.
human: add AI agent context files (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md)
automated: update git-timeline.json with latest commits

Implement group dragging and gesture hints
- Add drag-to-scroll support for grouped timeline view (Ctrl+Drag) to complement Ctrl+Scroll.
- Add "Gesture Hints" panel to the sidebar in `timeline.html` explaining available interactions (Scroll, Ctrl+Scroll, Drag, Ctrl+Drag).
- Refactor sidebar layout to accommodate the new hints panel below Tweakpane controls.

feat: Add debug-git option to timeline script

- Add `--debug-git` flag to `scripts/re-create-git-timeline.ts` to directly stream `git log` output to stdout for troubleshooting.
- Refactor `getGitLogArgs` into a shared helper function.
- Update the main execution block to handle the debug flag before processing commits.

feat: Support multiline commit messages in timeline

- Update `scripts/re-create-git-timeline.ts` to capture the full commit message body (`%B`) instead of just the subject (`%s`).
- Refactor the parser to handle multiline messages and stop collecting message lines when a `numstat` line is encountered.
- Update `public/project-history/git-timeline.json` with the full message content for recent commits.

feat: Center grid coordinates and adjust text size

- Replace `grid.cellToPixel` with `getPolygonCentroid` for coordinate label positioning, ensuring labels are visually centered within irregular cell shapes.
- Reduce coordinate text size scaling factor from `scaleEst / 2` to `scaleEst / 6` to prevent overlapping labels.
- Implement `getPolygonCentroid` helper method in `GridRenderer`.

feat: Center orbit cursor on mouse leave

- Update `handleMouseLeave` in `GridApp` to calculate the visual center of the grid and move the orbit cursor there instead of hiding it or resetting to (0,0).
- Ensures the orbit visualization remains active and centered when the mouse exits the canvas, providing a cleaner fallback state.
automated: update project statistics

feat: Use relative time labels for grouped timeline

- Introduce `formatScaleTickLabel` to generate relative time labels (e.g., "00:00", "01:00") relative to the group start, instead of absolute dates.
- Suppress "Milestone" labels (like year/month transitions) when grouping is active to avoid clutter and confusion with synthetic relative times.
- Update `drawScaleUnit` and `drawScaleMilestones` to use the new formatting logic.
- Implements specific relative formatting for minute, hour, day, month, and year units based on the active grouping mode.

feat: Add extended scale ticks

- Add `extendedScaleTicks` option to Timeline configuration and UI.
- When enabled, draws faint vertical lines extending from the scale down through the timeline, helping users align events across groups.
- Option is visible only in Timeline mode.

feat: Improve timeline scale visibility

- Raise z-index of timeline scale graphics and text to ensure they render above other elements (like group labels and commit points).
- Add a semi-transparent background and border to the scale overlay to improve readability and separation from scrolling content.

feat: Add configurable group scroll speed

- Add `groupScrollSpeed` configuration to adjust the vertical scrolling sensitivity in grouped timeline view.
- Expose scroll speed control in Tweakpane UI, visible only when grouping is active.
- Scroll delta is now calculated as `direction * gap * speed`.

feat: Snap timeline scrolling to group gap

- Update vertical scrolling logic (Ctrl+Scroll) in grouped timeline view to snap by `groupGap` increments.
- Improves navigation precision by aligning scroll steps with group rows.

feat: Make group gap configurable

- Add `groupGap` to timeline configuration and Tweakpane UI.
- Allow adjusting vertical spacing between groups dynamically when grouping is active.
- Automatically hide the "Group Gap" control when grouping is disabled or not in Timeline mode.
- Update `getLineGap` to use the configured `groupGap` value.

feat: Implement vertical scrolling for grouped timeline

- Add `timelineGroupScrollOffsetY` to track vertical scroll position in grouped view.
- Update `handleTimelineWheel` to handle Ctrl+Scroll for vertical scrolling when grouping is active.
- Update `updateTimelineVerticalOffset` to apply the scroll offset.
- Reset scroll offset when resetting the timeline view.

feat: Adjust timeline layout for grouped view

- Update `resetTimelineView` to dynamically calculate left and right padding based on group labels and change scale width when grouping is active.
- Refactor `drawChangeScale` to accept grouped commits and adjust drawing logic (though implementation details are truncated in the diff).
- Introduce `timelineGroupedLineGap` constant for better vertical spacing in grouped views.
automated: update project statistics

human: docs: Update TODO lists and notes

- Add vision notes on structured tags, algebraic data types, and templating engine ideas to `docs/TODOS-asimov-core.md`.
- Update `docs/TODOS-commit-messages.md` with a prompt snippet for generating commit messages.
- Document recent refactoring achievements (centralized highlighting, orbit overlay optimization) in `docs/TODOS-grid.md`.

Refactor: Simplify right-click handlers

- Introduce `removeParticlesOnHighlightedEdge` and `clearHighlightedCell` helper methods to encapsulate common actions.
- Simplify right-click logic in `handleMouseDown` by using these helpers, reducing code duplication and improving readability for 'spawnParticle', 'smart', and 'draw' modes.

Refactor: Consolidate particle removal and numeric adjustment logic

- Extract `removeParticlesOnHighlightedCellEdges` to eliminate duplicate logic for deleting particles from a selected cell.
- Introduce `adjustNumericSetting` helper to standardize clamped value updates for configuration settings.
- Apply `adjustNumericSetting` to keyboard handlers for orbit distance and particle speed adjustments.

refactor: Centralize orbit mouse updates

- Introduce `setOrbitMouse` to encapsulate `mouseX`/`mouseY` updates and orbit overlay refreshing.
- Refactor `handleMouseMove`, `handleMouseLeave`, and `handleMouseWheel` to use `setOrbitMouse`, ensuring consistent behavior and reducing code duplication.

refactor: Centralize highlight color logic

- Introduce `getHighlightColor` helper method to standardize edge and cell highlight color retrieval.
- Update `updateGrid` to use `clearHighlights` for consistent state cleanup.
- Replace duplicate highlight color logic in mouse move handler with `getHighlightColor`.

Refactor: Consolidate grid update logic

- Introduce `applyContainerOffsets` to centralize container positioning.
- Create `clearHighlights` to manage highlight cleanup.
- Refactor `setGridOffsetFromPan` to handle panning logic (inferred from diff context, as method name appears in usage).
- Use `refreshGridBindings` (inferred) to update UI bindings.
- Reduce code duplication in `updateGrid` and event handlers.

refactor: Remove focus debug overlay

- Remove the `focus-debug` element and related methods (`initFocusDebug`, `updateFocusDebug`) from `GridApp` and `index.html`.
- The debug overlay was useful for development but is no longer needed in the production UI.
- `focusBindingInput` remains active for accessibility but no longer updates the debug label.

feat: Add focus debug overlay and auto-focus bindings

- Add a debug overlay at the bottom of the screen to display the currently focused element's ID, name, and classes.
- Implement `focusBindingInput` helper to programmatically focus Tweakpane inputs.
- Automatically focus the corresponding input field when using 'O' (Orbit) or 'P' (Particle Speed) hotkeys, improving keyboard accessibility and feedback.

feat: Add keyboard shortcuts for Orbit and Particle settings

- Implement 'O' key handler to adjust orbit distance (Shift+O to decrease).
- Implement 'P' key handler to adjust particle speed (Shift+P to decrease).
- Bind particle speed control to `particleSpeedBinding` for UI synchronization.
- Consolidate keyboard event handling in `handleKeyDown`.

feat: Add spacebar shortcut for simulation toggle

- Implement `handleKeyDown` listener to toggle simulation running state when the Spacebar is pressed.
- Prevent default spacebar scrolling behavior.
- Ensure the shortcut is ignored when focusing input elements.

feat: Add simulation toolbar

- Implement a floating toolbar with a play/pause button for the simulation.
- Add `isSimulationRunning` to `AppConfig` to track simulation state.
- Update `index.html` with styles for the toolbar.
- Initialize toolbar in `GridApp` and handle button clicks to toggle simulation state.

perf: Optimize panning with requestAnimationFrame

- Throttles panning updates in `GridApp` using `requestAnimationFrame` to ensure visual updates are synchronized with the display refresh rate.
- Reduces CPU overhead by only processing the latest mouse delta per frame during high-frequency `mousemove` events.
- Defers UI binding refresh until `mouseup` to minimize redundant DOM updates.
- Properly handles RAF cancellation during input start/end to prevent stale updates.

perf: Optimize grid panning performance

- Update `GridApp` to directly modify container positions (`gridContainer`, `edgeContainer`, `particleContainer`) during panning instead of triggering a full `updateGrid()` recalculation on every mouse move.
- Add `panStartContainerPos` to track initial container coordinates for precise delta application.
- This results in significantly smoother panning feedback.

feat: Add session resume support to codex-with-autotranscript.sh

- Add optional [session-id] argument to resume existing sessions.
- Validate session ID as a UUID.
- Append session ID to the transcript log filename when resuming.
automated: update project statistics

feat: Clear highlights on mouse leave

- Implement `handleMouseLeave` to clear all grid highlights (edges, cells, vertices) when the mouse exits the canvas.
- Update `handleMouseWheel` to recalculate `mouseX`/`mouseY` relative to the grid and refresh the orbit overlay, fixing highlight drift during zooming.

feat: Implement grid panning with Ctrl+Click

- Add `isPanning`, `panStartMouse`, and `panStartOffset` state to `GridApp`.
- Implement `handleMouseDown` to initiate panning when Ctrl is held.
- Implement `handleMouseMove` to update `gridOffset` based on mouse movement during panning.
- Implement `handleMouseUp` to end the panning session.
- Add `window` level mouseup listener to ensure panning stops even if the mouse leaves the canvas.

feat: Smooth zoom interaction

- Change mouse wheel zoom to use a multiplicative factor (31/30) instead of a fixed linear step for smoother and more proportional zooming.
- Update grid scale binding step to 0.1 for finer manual control.

feat: Implement mouse-centered zooming and pan offset

- Add `gridOffset` to AppConfig to support panning logic (pan interaction not yet fully implemented).
- Update `centerViewToGrid` to reset `gridOffset` to `{0,0}`.
- Refactor grid positioning in `updateGrid` to apply both center alignment and manual `gridOffset`.
- Add helper `getCenterOffsetForScale` to calculate centering coordinates.
- Update mouse wheel handler to zoom towards the mouse pointer instead of the grid center.
- Add `Grid Offset` control to the Advanced settings panel.
human: clean code prompts :)

refactor: Remove unused `getVertexAtPixel` and cleanup particle spawning

- Remove `getVertexAtPixel` from `src/core/grid/grid-selection.ts` and its export in `src/core/grid/index.ts` as it's no longer used.
- Refactor repeated random cell-edge particle spawning logic into `spawnParticleOnRandomCellEdge` method in `GridApp` to reduce code duplication.

feat: Optimize vertex highlighting

- Replace expensive `getVertexAtPixel` search with a direct distance check against the endpoints of the currently highlighted edge.
- Add "Vertex Highlighting" toggle to the Advanced settings panel.
- This optimization avoids redundant grid searches when an edge is already identified.
human: update project statistics and repo timeline; cleanup grid prompts log

Refactor: Use helpers for DOM element retrieval in Markdown Viewer

- Replace direct `document.getElementById` calls and repetitive null checks with helper functions (`requireElement`, `requireInputElement`, `requireFormElement`).
- Ensure type safety and cleaner error handling during initialization.

feat: Link User Manual from Main App

- Add a "Documentation" section to the "About" tab in the Main App.
- Add a "User Manual" link pointing to the new Markdown Viewer, loading the Main App's manual page (`/documentation/user-manual/main/index.md`).

feat: Toggle meta controls in Markdown Viewer

- Add a checkbox to hide the header and status bar ("Meta Controls") for a cleaner reading experience.
- Implement 'm' keyboard shortcut to toggle visibility.
- Controls are hidden by default when loading the app.
- Update CSS to handle the `.hide-meta` state.
- Update HTML to reflect default hidden state and improved label text.

feat: Allow internal navigation in Markdown Viewer

- Remove `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"` from links generated in the Markdown Viewer.
- This allows relative links (which are rewritten to use the viewer) to open in the current tab instead of a new one, improving the navigation flow for documentation sets.

feat: Support relative links in Markdown Viewer

- Pass `baseUrl` (the URL of the current markdown file) down through `renderMarkdown` and `appendInline` to `appendLinksAndEmphasis`.
- Resolve relative links in markdown against `baseUrl` so they point to the correct location.
- If a link points to another `.md` file, rewrite it to open within the Markdown Viewer app (`?url=...`).

feat: Support relative links in Markdown Viewer

- Pass `baseUrl` (the URL of the current markdown file) down through `renderMarkdown` and `appendInline` to `appendLinksAndEmphasis`.
- Resolve relative links in markdown against `baseUrl` so they point to the correct location.
- If a link points to another `.md` file, rewrite it to open within the Markdown Viewer app (`?url=...`).

feat: Add standalone Markdown Viewer app

- Implement `markdown-viewer.html` and `src/apps/markdown-viewer/index.ts` to render Markdown files directly in the browser.
- Supports headings, paragraphs, lists (ordered/unordered), blockquotes, code blocks, inline code, links, bold, and italic text.
- Provides a simple UI with a URL input field and support for the `?url=` query parameter.
- Register `markdownViewer` in `vite.config.ts` as a new entry point.

docs: Create user manual pages for Main App and Statistics

- Create `public/documentation/user-manual/index.md` as the main entry point for the user manual.
- Create `public/documentation/user-manual/main/index.md` detailing the Main App's layout, coordinates, controls, and interaction modes (Draw, Spawn Particle, Smart).
- Initialize `public/documentation/user-manual/statistics/index.md` with an overview of the Project Statistics viewer.

feat: Improve statistics table layout and default exclusions

- Update `statistics.html` and `src/apps/statistics/index.ts` to use fixed table layouts with defined `<colgroup>` widths for better column alignment and readability.
- Add `.vscode` to the default `excludedFolders` list in `create-project-statistics.ts` to exclude editor configuration from statistics.
human: instructions for user manual
automated: update project statistics

refactor: Mark optional fields in ProjectStatistics

- Update `ProjectStatistics` interface in `types.ts` to mark `includedFiles`, `excludedFolders`, and `excludedFiles` as optional, ensuring compatibility with older statistics files that may lack these fields.
- Update `index.ts` to correctly handle `undefined` values for `includedFiles` when sorting and rendering.

feat: Persist collapsible section state

- Implement state tracking for collapsible sections (Overview, File Types, All Files, Excluded Paths, Repo Stats) in `StatisticsViewer`.
- Preserve open/closed state of sections across re-renders (e.g., when sorting tables or switching files).
- Add event listeners to `<details>` elements to update `sectionState` on toggle.

feat: Use collapsible sections for statistics

- Wrap major statistics sections (Overview, File Types, All Files, Excluded Paths, Repo Stats) in `<details>` elements for collapsible UI.
- Ensure sections are open by default.
- Handle legacy statistics data where `includedFiles` might be missing by conditionally rendering the "All Files" table or an "unknown" placeholder.

feat: Make file type breakdown table sortable

- Add sorting functionality to the "File Types Breakdown" table.
- Implement `sortFileTypes` helper and state management for sort key and direction.
- Update table headers to be interactive with sort indicators.
- Use generic sort handling patterns consistent with the "All Files" table.
human: update project statistics to have test data for new sorting feature :)

Refactor: Remove redundant file groupings from statistics

- Remove "Included Files by Type" section and related helper functions `renderIncludedFilesByType` and `groupFilesByType`.
- Remove unused styles for file grouping from `statistics.html`.
- The "All Files" table now serves as the primary view for file details, reducing clutter and redundancy.

feat: Add sort direction to statistics file table

- Implement ascending/descending sort toggling for the "All Files" table in the statistics viewer.
- Add sort indicators (arrows) to table headers.
- Set sensible default sort directions: ascending for text columns, descending for numeric columns.
- Refactor `renderAllFilesTable` and helper functions to support directional sorting.

docs: Update TODO lists and guidelines

- Add templating engine ideas to `docs/TODOS-asimov-core.md`.
- Create `docs/TODOS-golden.md` with instructions for verifying CI failures.
- Update `docs/TODOS-grid.md` with detailed smart click behavior specs and cleanup plans.
- Archive old timeline todos into `docs/TODOS-timeline.md` and initialize a new history section.
- Expand `docs/documentation/user-manual/ai-instructions.md` with comprehensive documentation guidelines for the main app and sub-apps.

feat: Enhance statistics report with detailed file breakdowns

- Update `ProjectStatistics` interface to include `includedFiles`, providing per-file stats (path, type, lines, words, bytes).
- Enhance `StatisticsViewer` to display:
  - "Included Files by Type": Grouped details in collapsible sections.
  - "All Files": A sortable table listing every included file with its metrics.
- Update styles in `statistics.html` to support sortable headers and file grouping UI.
- Regenerate statistics JSON with new data structure.
automated: update project statistics

Refactor: Simplify mouse handling using highlighted info

- Remove redundant pixel-to-grid calculations in `handleMouseDown` by leveraging `highlightedEdgeInfo` and `highlightedCellInfo` computed in `updateHighlights`.
- Simplify `spawnParticle` and `draw` mode logic to directly use pre-calculated highlight information.
- Remove unused `canvas` and `rect` variables from `handleMouseDown`.

Refactor: Separate smart mode logic in click handlers

- Refactor `GridApp` left-click handling to isolate `smart` mode logic from `spawnParticle` and `draw` modes for better clarity.
- Implement explicit checks for highlighted edges and cells in `smart` mode to handle particle spawning (edge click) and state drawing (cell click) or random particle spawning (Shift + cell click).
- Adjust right-click + Shift behavior in `smart` mode to prioritize edge deletion over cell-wide deletion.

Still buggy: feat: Enable cell-wide particle deletion in smart mode

- Update right-click + Shift behavior in 'smart' mode to remove particles from all edges of the highlighted cell, consistent with 'spawnParticle' mode functionality.

Still buggy: Refactor: Refine particle deletion interactions

- Update right-click logic in `GridApp` to better handle particle deletion in different modes.
- In 'spawnParticle' mode, right-click now reliably removes particles from highlighted edges or cells without clearing cell state.
- In 'smart' mode, right-click + Shift is now required to remove particles from a highlighted edge.
human: drafting AI instructions for user manual :)

feat: Add ability to delete particles with right-click

- Implement `removeParticlesOnEdge` and `removeParticlesOnEdges` in `ParticleSystem`.
- Update `GridApp` to track currently highlighted edge and cell info.
- Bind right-click action to remove particles from the highlighted edge or cell's edges when in particle spawning modes.

Refactor: Move solver logic to dedicated directory

- Move solver source and test files from `src/core/utils/` to `src/core/solver/` to improve project structure.
- Update `eslint.config.js` to reflect the new directory structure in ignore patterns.

Merge branch 'var-1--rework-render-architecture'
human: instructions for refactoring

Refactor rendering to use screen-space coordinates for improved scaling and visual consistency.
Implemented a "screen-space rendering" architecture where polygons, labels, axes, and hover highlights are drawn based on screen coordinates rather than world coordinates. This ensures that visual elements like stroke widths, hover radii, and dash patterns remain consistent and legible regardless of the zoom level. Added helper functions worldToScreen, getStrokeWidthPx, getStrokeWidthWorld, and getPolygonScreenPoints to facilitate this transformation and updated drawing logic across the Tile Editor to utilize these new helpers. Also adjusted hit testing and hover detection to align with the new coordinate system.
